chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 航空航天电气系统互联组件方案商获数千万融资，细分赛道市占率第一
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，青岛北辰航天航天科技有限公司（下称“北辰航天”）近日完成数千万元天使轮融资，由云启资本独家投资，翊荣资本担任长期独家财务顾问。

北辰航天旗下全资子公司青岛北辰数智科技有限公司成立于2014年，长期深耕航空航天电气系统互联组件研制领域，提供从设计到组装的系统工程解决方案。

电气系统互联是航天器的五大核心组成之一，类似于人体的“神经与血管”，承担电源分配、信号传输、测量控制等关键功能，具有高复杂度与高可靠性要求。随着商业航天、深空探测及低空飞行器的发展，仪器布局与电气系统互联（电缆网）敷设设计及配套电气系统互联组件产品正迎来新的需求增长。

据了解，北辰航天早期即以体制内外协方身份参与航天领域电气系统互联系统设计，深度参与多项运载型号的三维设计工作，技术成熟度行业领先。

经过十余年积累，北辰航天已具备面向航空航天企业的全流程一站式服务能力，从设备构型布局、电气系

chinese_news.title: 获高秉强、蓝驰领投数千万融资，浙大00后创业者从远景观测切入AI智能影像｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，星识（宁波）科技有限公司（以下简称“星识科技”）近日连续完成天使+轮和天使++轮融资，累计金额达数千万元。两轮融资分别由高秉强教授旗下高锋耐心资本和蓝驰创投领投、松禾资本跟投，老股东清水湾二期基金及奇绩创坛持续加注。本轮资金将主要用于智能影像核心技术研发、新品矩阵打造和产品体验的迭代优化，以及生产体系与供应链能力建设。此前，公司已获得李泽湘教授旗下宁波智能技术研究院、清水湾二期基金及奇绩创坛的种子轮及天使轮投资。

星识科技是一家专注智能影像技术研发与硬件制造的企业，以远景观测场景为切点，曾推出融合AI功能的Vizta智能望远镜，已在Kickstarter和Indiegogo众筹达数百万元。

望远镜作为长期被传统光学巨头主导的市场，正在被新生代创业者以消费级的智能化产品重新撬动。星识科技巧妙地通过结构设计与AI算法创新，将手机变为智能望远镜，不仅低成本、高效地实现了远景观测和拍摄的一体性，还通过AI功能进一步降低了产品操作门槛、丰富了产品玩法和趣味性。这种软硬件融合的创新解决

chinese_news.title: 「维新宇航」完成数千万元天使+轮融资，7座3吨级eVTOL将于7月进行首飞测试｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 阿至

36氪获悉，低空出行产品研制商「维新宇航」已完成数千万元天使+轮融资，本轮融资由策源资本领投、金舵投资跟投，资金将主要用于加速公司首款主力机型 Vector 5的研发迭代、首飞测试与适航取证进程。

维新宇航成立于2023年，是36氪长期关注的企业，其专注于大载客量、大载重eVTOL/eCTOL产品的研发及制造。加上6个月前连续完成的种子轮、天使轮，目前维新宇航已完成三轮融资，累计资金交割总额超亿元人民币。

现阶段，维新宇航的主力机型Vector 5为一款7座3吨级纯电复合翼eVTOL，该机型专注于应急救援和医疗急救等民生刚需场景，最大起飞重量为3180kg、最大载荷为680kg，最大航程300km、最高巡航速度为 250km/h，全尺寸样机已于去年6月正式下线。

chinese_news.title: 卡位黄金价格带，问界M6向下争夺年轻群体｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
2026年的中国新能源SUV市场正经历着前所未有的内卷。

问界依托华为技术体系，推出了定位更亲民的全新车型 M6， 瞄准主流家用消费群体。放在问界品牌整体销量连续数月下滑、赛力斯盈利能力承压的背景下，M6的到来既是“救兵”，更是一场不容有失的“大考”。

卡位黄金价格带，向下争夺年轻群体

从产品命名逻辑看，M6位于M5与M7之间，车身尺寸为4960×1985×1736mm，轴距2950mm，属于标准的中大型五座SUV。官方定位为“新锐智慧SUV”，目标用户从问界以往的主力“30岁以上家庭用户和商务人群”向下延伸至25-35岁城市年轻群体。

25-30万元是目前中国新能源SUV市场竞争最激烈的价格带——特斯拉Model Y、理想L6、小鹏G6、比亚迪唐等车型均在此区间鏖战。作为参考，理想L6起售价24.98万元，小鹏G6起售价20.99万元，Model Y后驱版26.35万元。问界M6以25.98万元起售，锚定的正是理想L6的核心区间，试图以更低门槛的增程方案和更激进的全系标配策略争夺年轻家庭用户。

chinese_news.title: 小红书四年AI 路：FOMO、犹豫，到突然加速
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 肖思佳

编辑 | 乔芊 杨轩

所有互联网大中厂都渴望在AI时代博得位置，在这场比赛中，小红书曾是克制的那个。

在一个搜索属性与社区属性并存，以真实经验分享为核心的产品中，活人感与AI、温情和算法，始终像天平的两端。

很长一段时间里，小红书既没有完全缺席技术探索，也没有像许多同行那样高调推进AI产品化。相反，这家公司始终在两股力量的拉锯和平衡中前行：一边持续投入模型能力，一边谨慎控制AI对社区生态的介入。

但2026年，随着Agent叙事的升温，小红书开始显露出某种急迫。

4月30日，小红书发送全员内部信，宣布成立AI一级部门Dots，“建立从模型研发、基础设施、工程到产品的完整技术体系，整合顶尖AI人才和资源。”Dots向小红书新任总裁柯南汇报。

据36氪了解，Dots部门由原人文智能实验室Hi Lab升级而来，下设模型研发、基础设施、工程、产品四个部门。目前小红书内部最重要的AI应用产品“点点”也被纳入该

chinese_news.title: 第一代全固态电池迈入规模化市场，「纯锂新能源」完成数千万元Pre-A+轮融资 | 36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 张冰冰

编辑 | 阿至

36氪获悉，北京纯锂新能源科技有限公司（以下简称「纯锂新能源」）近日宣布完成数千万元Pre-A+轮融资，投资方为亦庄国投，云道资本担任独家财务顾问，资金将用于产品研发、市场拓展及产线落地。

「纯锂新能源」成立于2022年5月，聚焦全固态电池研发，通过自研复合电解质及超临界包覆工艺，破解全固态电池核心固固接触难题。2023年4月在北京亦庄建成小试线，量产10Ah全固态电芯；2023年5月在河南兰考县国电投新能源产业园启动建设500MWh规模量产线；2024年10月实现50Ah全固态电芯量产。

「纯锂新能源」于2025年推出第一代固态电池，全固态产品平均失重率0.023%，产品通过第三方国家标准实验室安全认证（CNAS）GB/T36276-2018 检测，目前正优先推进储能场景落地，并在低速动力等方向开展验证，为后续进入更广泛动力电池市场积累工程与商业化基础。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will CME bitcoin volatility derivatives (BVOL) launch by June 30, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: 'CME is set to let traders bet on bitcoin volatility, not just price'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will hantavirus from MV Hondius outbreak spread beyond Tenerife by July 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Cruise ship docking Sunday in Tenerife amid remote expedition travel boom; prediction markets already pricing sub-1% probability of international spread, creating asymmetric tail risk.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will DeepSeek's Series funding round close at or above 50 billion RMB (~$7B USD equivalent) by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: DeepSeek official announcement or SEC filings if US listing; 36Kr/Caixin reporting on final terms
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Chinese tech media (36氪) reported DeepSeek fundraising up to 50B target; Western markets haven't priced the valuation implications for OpenAI/Anthropic competitive dynamics; AI funding rounds in China move fast and surprise upside.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36氪: 'DeepSeek拟募资最高500亿' (DeepSeek targeting up to 50B RMB fundraise) — signals aggressive capital raise amid US-China AI rivalry

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Trump-Xi summit occur by September 30, 2026, AND will rare earth supply chain be primary agenda item (not secondary to Iran)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: White House official readout + Reuters/Bloomberg reporting on summit agenda priorities
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reports Iran focus may delay progress on tariffs and rare earths at Trump-Xi summit — creates hedging opportunity: if Iran/geopolitical crisis overshadows trade, rare earth supply chain gets deprioritized, benefiting Chinese rare earth producers.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths' — signals bifurcation risk: geopolitical tail risk pushes commodities/defense up, trade normalization down

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Nvidia's portfolio company commercial deal revenue (disclosed or estimated) exceed 15% of subsidiary AI revenue by Q4 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Nvidia earnings call guidance + SEC 10-K disclosures of material investee revenues
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Nvidia simultaneously investing $40B+ in AI stack companies AND signing commercial deals with them creates FOI/conflict-of-interest narrative not yet reflected in prediction markets; if deals materialize at scale, it signals self-dealing or brilliant ecosystem lock-in.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'Nvidia is pouring billions at a time into companies across the AI infrastructure stack, while also signing commercial deals with them' — parallel investing + commercial revenue creates opacity around deal quality

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Swiss central bank approve a bitcoin reserve holdings proposal by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Swiss National Bank (SNB) official statement or Parliament vote record
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Swiss CBR bitcoin reserve push recently failed over signature shortfall — resubmission and re-vote likely in 2026; if approved, becomes major institutional legitimacy signal for BTC as strategic reserve; currently priced as niche topic.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: 'Swiss central bank bitcoin reserve push fails over signature shortfall' — signals renewed attempt incoming; successful resubmission would reframe BTC as macro safe-haven comparable to gold

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Hungary's new PM Péter Magyar enact EU-aligned financial regulation changes that reduce crypto-friendly corporate tax arbitrage by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Hungarian Parliament legislative records + Péter Magyar administration official statements
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: BBC reports Magyar's Tisza party swept 16 years of Orbán's rule in landslide; Magyar explicitly positioned as pro-EU; Hungary was Orbán's crypto haven. New regime likely reverses crypto-friendly policies, creating regulatory tail risk for Hungary-registered crypto entities.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BBC: 'I will serve - not rule over Hungary, says new PM' + 'Nearly a month ago Péter Magyar steered his Tisza party to a landslide victory, sweeping away 16 years of rule by Viktor Orbán' — signals ideological reversal on financial libertarianism

investment_theses.thesis: Geopolitical premium (Iran-US tensions, Strait of Hormuz blockade) drives oil & energy security outperformance; BTC reprices upward as inflation hedge and geopolitical insurance amid ~1B barrels lost supply.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has resulted in the loss of nearly a billion barrels of oil with the shortage growing worse every day'
BBC: 'Iran accuses US of reckless military adventure' — escalation rhetoric persists
Historical precedent: 2022 Russia-Ukraine spike drove BTC +15% in similar supply-shock window
investment_theses.counter_view: If diplomatic breakthrough emerges (Iran nuclear deal re-engagement) or US-Iran ceasefire holds, geopolitical premium collapses and energy prices tank, pulling BTC lower with it; Fed still tight, limiting liquidity tailwind.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC/USD spot or BTC Jun-2026 perps; hedge with short crude oil (CL) if expecting false alarm de-escalation

investment_theses.thesis: CLARITY Act Senate Banking Committee passage (May 14) removes regulatory overhang for US-listed crypto infrastructure; ETH and mid-cap crypto mining (MARA, CLSK, MSTR) outperform BTC on regulatory clarity bid.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Major crypto bill slated for May 14 Senate Banking Committee vote'
CoinDesk: 'Crypto industry cheers Senate Clarity Act markup date as market structure push resumes'
Cointelegraph: 'The CLARITY Act will help reshore the crypto industry in the US — Attorney'
investment_theses.counter_view: Bill fails to advance past committee (political obstruction, or surprise GOP/Dem defection); or bill passes but is later gutted in full Senate floor negotiation; market treats markup as non-event if amendments weaken digital asset framework.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio or ETH outright; long MARA, CLSK, MSTR equity on regulatory clarity catalyst; buy call spreads if IV crush risk is priced in

investment_theses.thesis: Chinese AI competitiveness (DeepSeek 50B RMB raise + Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) AI acceleration) challenges US AI moat; NVDA's 40B+ equity portfolio risk to Chinese alternatives means NVDA/ Nvidia semi inventory builds face demand uncertainty.
supporting_signals: 36氪 (Chinese source, pre-English): 'DeepSeek拟募资最高500亿' — signals aggressive capital deployment in Chinese AI stack
36氪: '小红书四年AI路：FOMO、犹豫，到突然加速' (Xiaohongshu accelerating AI after period of restraint) — indicates Chinese social tech now in arms race mode
CNBC: 'Nvidia embraces role of AI investor' + conflict-of-interest flagging
investment_theses.counter_view: DeepSeek fundraise stalls, Chinese AI capex slows due to macro pressure; US export controls remain effective in limiting Chinese semiconductor access; NVDA portfolio bets prove valuable because they lock in early-stage AI winners.
investment_theses.expression: Reduce NVDA long or hedge with NVDA puts; pair trade: short NVDA / long SMH (semiconductor ETF) to neutralize sector beta; or short NVDA vs long ASML (if believing China demand destroyed faster than Europe supply contracts)

investment_theses.thesis: Emerging-market crypto adoption (Binance reports emerging-market users treating exchanges like banks) + DeFi disrupting LatAm banking (CoinDesk cite) implies USD-stablecoin (USDC, USDT) yields and DeFi money-market tokens (AAVE, COMP) outperform as remittance/banking rails.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Emerging-market users are treating crypto exchanges like banking apps, Binance says'
CoinDesk: 'How DeFi is changing the financial landscape for Latin Americans'
36氪 (Chinese EM context): 'AI开始接管年轻人的精神自留地' (AI adoption racing in emerging-market youth cohorts, suggesting parallel fintech migration)
investment_theses.counter_view: EM macros deteriorate (currency crisis, inflation spiral); exchanges face regulatory crackdowns in LatAm/Southeast Asia; DeFi smart-contract risk or flash-loan hacks erode user confidence; traditional banking re-captures unbanked via lower-friction onramps.
investment_theses.expression: Long USDC staking yield or AAVE collateralized lending tokens; long COMP; use derivatives on emerging-market crypto adoption indices if available (e.g., betting Binance EM trading volume grows >20% QoQ through 2026)

investment_theses.thesis: Home data-center boom (CNBC reports emerging home-scale data-center design as public opposition to utility-scale builds rises) + AI compute scarcity = edge compute and distributed GPU rental tokens (IO, Akash, similar) rally as alternative to capex-intensive Nvidia.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'How to take control of the AI data center boom and built it into your own home in the future — As public support for large-scale data center buildouts declines across the U.S., a new type designed to operate inside individual homes is coming'
Hacker News trending: Bun (Rust rewrite) + Google reCAPTCHA breaking for de-googled Android suggests grass-roots developer appetite for decentralized infrastructure
Crypto trending tokens (BILL, AURA) suggest speculative appetite for infrastructure/utility tokens
investment_theses.counter_view: Home data centers remain niche due to power/cooling/bandwidth constraints; utility-scale capex continues to dominate (Blackrock, Microsoft, Google push ahead); distributed compute tokens suffer from adoption frictions and mining profitability collapse.
investment_theses.expression: If IO or Akash tokens are liquid: long as proxy for distributed GPU rental thesis; or synthetic via long GPU spot market (GPU leasing platforms) / short Nvidia GPU forward contracts; or thematic bet via MU (memory chip demand from home-server builds)
